proves: readers observe only the complete predecessor or successor artifact
the final visible snapshot is the committed successor
cancelled commit lock waiters publish no generation
cancelled delta-seal lock waiters publish no generation
retry state is preserved and an exact retry succeeds
seed, batch replacement, delete, and staged newcomer generations are each atomic
interleaved readers observe every complete generation without a torn artifact
two durable reopen cycles reproduce the final query artifact exactly
the same scheduled seed produces identical manifests
the same scheduled seed produces byte-identical segments
the same scheduled seed produces identical ranked and scoreless query artifacts

crash_and_recover.direct_e6_5: The watch suite performs two durable close-and-reopen loops after scheduled atomic generations.
crash_and_recover.inherited_e3_9: The E3.9 schedule matrix remains green and covers concurrent publication/cancellation composition.
crash_and_recover.inherited_keeper: The full Quill suite includes the existing deterministic Keeper publish, crash-window, checkpoint-order, interrupted-install, and recovery matrices.
crash_and_recover.scope_note: Mid-publication checkpoint injection is inherited from the Keeper suites; the new E6.5 watch test does not claim to inject a process crash inside an individual filesystem operation.

composed_engine_wide_coverage.resource_oracles: Every LabRuntime schedule is required to quiesce under the existing report oracle; failed schedules report the replay seed and trace fingerprint.

tantivy_contrast.finding: The incumbent Tantivy engine does not expose its internal indexing and merge task graph to asupersync LabRuntime.
tantivy_contrast.consequence: It cannot provide this campaign's exact seeded task schedule, LabRuntime quiescence oracle, or trace-fingerprint replay contract. This is a structural Quill capability rather than a Tantivy differential claim.

post_rebase_validation.upstream_change: Dormant grouped-MaxScore candidate machinery for nested unions changed another section of the same Quill source file.

ubs.interpretation: The file-wide Rust findings are the existing test panic/assertion and false secret-comparison heuristic inventory; no unsafe-code finding or new production defect was identified. UBS-internal local Cargo subchecks are inadmissible under this campaign's remote-only policy and are excluded from authoritative evidence.

coordination.agent_mail: Reservations were granted conflict-free. Completion messaging remains subject to the known Agent Mail database-integrity failure, so Git, worktree state, and Beads are coordination truth.

remote_only.note: All authoritative Cargo gates above ran through RCH with RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1. No local Cargo result is included.
